About me

I build research-driven, user-centered digital systems.

Passionate about building innovative digital solutions through research, design, and technology. I enjoy creating user-centered systems, conducting research, and developing applications that solve real-world problems — combining practical development with thoughtful design so every interface supports clear decisions and smoother workflows.

Python YOLOv8 Flask HTML / CSS / JS PHP MySQL Figma Firebase

Research

Data collection, analysis, documentation, and technical writing.

Web development

HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP for full-stack web systems.

UI/UX design

Figma, Canva, wireframing, and prototyping for clean interfaces.

Database

MySQL and Firebase for structured, scalable data.

Artificial intelligence

Machine learning, computer vision, YOLO, and OpenCV.

Selected work

Featured Projects

A selection of systems, platforms, and AI-driven tools built through research, design, and applied development.

AI / Computer Vision
Overview
Detection Engine
Geospatial Map

AI-Based Drone Waste Detection & Geospatial Mapping System

An intelligent waste monitoring system that uses drone imagery, artificial intelligence, and geospatial mapping for smart environmental monitoring. Detects and classifies waste in real-time using YOLOv8, then maps hotspots with geographic coordinates for campus sustainability insights.

Python YOLOv8 OpenCV Flask SQLite Geospatial
Capstone Project · 2026
Mobile Application
Splash Screen
Main Dashboard
Live Gesture Scanner

GestureIQ: Gesture Intelligence

A mobile gesture recognition system powered by CNN deep learning models designed to identify hand gestures in real time. It features a live scanning module capable of recognizing multiple unique hand signals (like Thumbs Up, Peace Sign, and Open Palm) with an optimized 94% detection accuracy.

CNN Deep Learning Mobile App
ITSpec3 Final Project · 2nd Sem
Mobile Application
User Authentication
Adventure Gear Marketplace
Rental Organizations

RideTrek

An adventure gear rental mobile application designed to connect outdoor enthusiasts with local rental organizations. The platform allows users to find, browse, and book outdoor equipment like bicycles, skateboards, and camping gear based on proximity, ratings, and daily pricing metrics.

Mobile App UI/UX Design Rental Platform
Startup Project · 2026
Marketing Material
Cover & Highlights
Features & Pricing Guide

RideTrek Promotional Brochure

A promotional tri-fold marketing brochure created in Canva to pitch the RideTrek startup platform. It highlights the brand's identity, presents structured daily pricing scales for equipment, outlines the platform's location-based onboarding system, and integrates actionable scan-to-download features tailored for travelers and students.

Canva Graphic Design Startup Pitch
Startup Project · 2026
